Klasse Warning

java.lang.Object
ch.framedev.lagersystem.classes.Warning
public class Warning extends Object
Represents a warning with severity type, message, and resolution flags.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Warning

      public Warning(String title, String message, Warning.WarningType type, String date, boolean isResolved, boolean isDisplayed)
      Creates a new warning.
      Parameter:
      title - short warning title
      message - detailed warning message
      type - warning category
      date - warning date text
      isResolved - whether the warning is resolved
      isDisplayed - whether the warning has been displayed

  • Methodendetails

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Gibt zurück:
      short warning title

      public void setTitle(String title)
      Parameter:
      title - short warning title

      Gibt zurück:

      public void setMessage(String message)
      Parameter:

      public Warning.WarningType getType()
      Gibt zurück:

    • setType

      public void setType(Warning.WarningType type)
      Parameter:
      type - warning category

    • getDate

      public String getDate()
      Gibt zurück:
      warning date text

    • setDate

      public void setDate(String date)
      Parameter:
      date - warning date text

    • isResolved

      public boolean isResolved()
      Gibt zurück:
      true when resolved

    • setResolved

      public void setResolved(boolean resolved)
      Parameter:
      resolved - whether the warning is resolved

      Gibt zurück:
